title: Uppercase name and its length
prompt: For the "named" customers (whose name does not start with "Customer "), return their name in uppercase and the number of characters in the name, using string functions. Columns: name_upper, name_length. Order by name_upper.

generic: SELECT UPPER(name) AS name_upper, LENGTH(name) AS name_length

hints: UPPER(name) upper-cases the string; LENGTH(name) counts its characters.
Restrict to named customers with WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Customer %'.
